name: @0xmmo/crew
description: Let Claude Code and Codex agents talk to each other: live shared context across sessions and agent-to-agent messaging. Ship features in parallel, no branches, no worktrees.

scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=require('./package.json').version;const p='.claude-plugin/plugin.json';const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));j.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')" && git add .claude-plugin/plugin.json
scripts.send: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=require('./package.json').version.split('.');v[2]=+v[2]+1;const p='.claude-plugin/plugin.json';const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));j.version=v.join('.');fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')" && git add . && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -am checkpoint) && npm version patch && npm login && npm publish
